title: Design System: Scout — The Expedition Log

shadows.name: hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Subtle amber ring on interactive element hover — table rows, filter buttons, clickable cards.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus-visible indicator. Double ring with dark gap and amber outer.

shadows.name: toast-float
shadows.purpose: Toast notification float above the page. The only resting shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — hover, focus, active. 150-200ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on screen — Filter, Score, Refresh.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #e3a83b; color: #191613; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f0b84a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #191613, 0 0 0 4px rgba(227, 168, 59, 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions — Refresh when Filter is primary, Close detail panel.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #a09888; border: 1px solid #3a352e; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #ece7df; border-color: #5a9e8c; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #191613, 0 0 0 4px rgba(227, 168, 59, 0.5); }

components.name: Verdict Badge — STRONG
components.description: STRONG verdict indicator. Warm sage green.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-badge-strong { background: rgba(77, 158, 92, 0.18); color: #4d9e5c; }

components.name: Verdict Badge — TARPIT
components.description: TARPIT warning indicator. Warm brick red.

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard stat card — label above value. Used in the stats bar.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #221e1a; border: 1px solid #3a352e; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; min-width: 100px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; color: #a09888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ece7df; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Detail Card
components.description: Score dimension card in the detail panel grid.
components.css: .ds-detail-card { background: #191613; border: 1px solid #3a352e; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; } .ds-detail-heading { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; color: #a09888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-detail-score { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ece7df; } .ds-detail-meta { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #a09888; margin-top: 6px; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: Idea list table row with hover state.
components.html: 1AI-powered legal doc review78STRONG
components.css: .ds-table-row { cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-table-row:hover { background: oklch(26% 0.006 70); } .ds-table-cell { padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #3a352e; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ece7df; vertical-align: middle; } .ds-table-cell--dim { color: #a09888; } .ds-table-cell--score { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: Fixed-position toast for live update notifications.
components.css: .ds-toast { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; background: #221e1a; border: 1px solid #4d9e5c; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ece7df; z-index: 1000; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-toast.show { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-toast { transition: opacity 200ms ease; transform: none; } .ds-toast.show { transform: none; } }

narrative.overview:
Scout is an explorer's instrument — a field journal and star chart for startup ideas. The interface evokes a late-night study: lamplight pooling on a leather-bound journal, warmth against the dark, the quiet thrill of prospecting. Each idea is a discovered landmark, not a database row.

The system is built on a warm dark palette anchored by amber gold — the color of lamplight on a desk. It rejects the cold blue-gray severity of developer tools (the current GitHub-dark baseline) and the generic SaaS dashboard template entirely. Surfaces are deep and warm, typography is precise but human, and motion is restrained to state transitions — the user is in flow, not watching a show.

This is a product surface (design SERVES the task), so consistency and density are virtues. But it's also a personal instrument — it should feel crafted and alive, not sterile. Delight lives in the warmth of the palette and the precision of the typography, not in decorative motion or novel affordances.
keyCharacteristics: Warm dark: deep brown-black base with amber lamplight accent
Product-first: system sans-serif stack, consistent component vocabulary, WCAG AA
Restrained motion: 150–200ms state transitions only, no choreographed sequences
Flat-by-default elevation: tonal layering over shadow stacks
Opinionated, not configurable: this is one founder's instrument

rules.name: The Lamplight Rule
rules.body: The amber primary accent carries ≤15% of any screen's surface area. Its rarity is what makes it luminous.

rules.name: The No Cold Blue Rule
rules.body: No color on the screen may have hue ≤210° (true blue through violet). The coldest permitted hue is warm teal (190°).

rules.name: The Semantic Warmth Rule
rules.body: Every semantic color pulls warmer than its conventional hex. Green toward sage, blue toward steel, red toward brick.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: One sans-serif family for everything. No display/body pairing. Product UI doesn't need font contrast.

rules.name: The No Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Labels appear only where they label something functional. Never as standalone decorative kickers above sections.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: No surface casts a shadow in its default state. Shadows appear only as interaction feedback or for floating elements.

dos: Use the amber primary accent on ≤15% of any screen. One primary button, selected states, and the focus ring.
Use tonal layering (Expedition Black → Journal Surface → Raised Surface) to convey hierarchy instead of shadows.
Keep body text at ≥0.875rem and ≥4.5:1 contrast against its background.
Use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on prose justification blocks.
Warm every semantic color — green toward sage, blue toward steel, red toward brick.
Use the mono font stack for scores, IDs, and timestamps in table cells. Tabular figures.
Show a loading spinner for async operations, never a blank screen or disabled button.
Include prefers-reduced-motion: reduce alternatives for every animation and transition.
donts: Don't use cold blue-gray (#58a6ff, GitHub's blue accent) or any hue ≤210°.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: blue sidebar, white cards, chart widgets, hero-metric templates.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, or decorative blur effects.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left: 3px solid) as colored accents.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above sections.
Don't put shadows on elements at rest.
Don't use more than one font family.
Don't use modal dialogs for content that can live inline.
Don't animate layout properties. Use transform and opacity only.
Don't ship motion without a reduced-motion fallback.
Don't let heading text overflow at tablet/mobile breakpoints.
